description_long: This is a red ceramic mug with a glossy finish, featuring a prominent white bull's head logo on one side, reminiscent of sports team branding. The mug has a rounded cylindrical body and a sturdy, curved handle attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping. The surface shows signs of wear, with visible scuff marks and scratches, giving it a slightly used, urban look. The interior appears to be filled with a white liquid, possibly milk or coffee with cream. The mug's overall shape is classic, with a wide opening and a flat base for stability. Its bold color and logo make it stand out as a personal or collectible item, likely to be found in urban environments such as cafes, offices, or homes.
description: A red ceramic mug with a white bull's head logo, glossy finish, and visible wear marks, featuring a sturdy handle and filled with a white liquid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bull's head logo prominently on the red glossy surface, with the mug's opening and some liquid visible inside.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved handle and the worn, scratched surface, with no logo visible from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view centers on the handle, showing more scuff marks and the mug's rounded shape, with the logo not visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view reveals part of the bull's head logo and the handle, along with additional surface wear.
